case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK VS. WHAYNE J CLAYTON et al

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK AS TO DEFENDANT CLAYTON, WHAYNE J DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-14-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-15-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-30-2003
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK SERVED AUG-03-2003, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CLAYTON, WHAYNE J
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, COST BILL $160.30 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT CLAYTON, WHAYNE J
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT: COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS; AND COSTS CCP 1033 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF NOV-14-2003, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT ON FILE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS
DECLARATION RE WAIVER OF EXCESS INTEREST AND ATTY'S FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CLAYTON, WHAYNE J $3,879.00 PRINCIPAL, $379.38 INTEREST, $160.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,418.68, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
